getBody(Statement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
Retrieves the block body of a loop if present.
getMarkedFors() - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachMarkerVisitor
Returns the set of EnhancedForStatement nodes marked for transformation.

Returns the set of ForStatement nodes marked for transformation.
